Contact BeiLuo — Get an Infineon Quote

Reach BeiLuo's sales and FAE team directly via WhatsApp or WeChat for real-time stock and pricing, or find your nearest regional office below. As an Infineon authorized distributor, we respond to every inquiry within 24 hours.

BeiLuo Global Sales Network

Our commitment to providing exceptional service and local support is reflected in our extensive global sales network. From our headquarters in Shandong to major economic centers across Asia, Europe, and the Americas, the BeiLuo team is strategically positioned to meet your needs. Find your nearest office below.

BeiLuo — Serving Customers Worldwide

Business Hours & Response Time

Our sales and FAE team is available Monday–Friday, 9:00–18:00 (GMT+8). WhatsApp and WeChat messages are typically answered within a few hours during business hours, and every inquiry sent to a regional office above receives a response within 24 hours.

BeiLuo

Top 8 Electronic Component Distributor in China

Infineon authorized distributor since 2013 — Top 8 in China, with 10,000+ Infineon part numbers in Shenzhen bonded-warehouse stock.
